name: issue-triage
tagline: Three-phase GitHub issue triage: audits, categorizes, flags duplicates/risk, drafts comments, posts actions only after explicit user.
verdict: Well-built workflow: mandatory human confirmation before any GitHub write, explicit failure handling for auth/API/collaborator lookups, and idempotent re-labeling checks. Weak spots: description omits that the skill also labels and closes issues, and the duplicate-detection/comment formats lack a fully worked example. No version signal.

highlights.summary: Description says only 'audit...post comments' but body also auto-generates label and close actions (gh issue edit --add-label, gh issue close), undisclosed in description.
Output tables and draft-comment/validation templates are shown only as placeholders; no worked example with real data (e.g. an actual Jaccard score).
No version field, changelog, or dated revision notes in frontmatter or body.
